case_title: MCGEACHIN,JOHN S. VS LEE,CHRISTOPHER (CHRIS)C/O PINKERTON SECURITY CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $560.01 FILED BY MCGEACHIN,JOHN S. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE,CHRISTOPHER (CHRIS)C/O PINKERTON SECURITY CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGEACHIN,JOHN S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE,CHRISTOPHER (CHRIS)C/O PINKERTON SECURITY CO. $560.01 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $599.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE,CHRISTOPHER (CHRIS)C/O PINKERTON SECURITY CO.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $636.52 AS TO DEFENDANT LEE,CHRISTOPHER (CHRIS)C/O PINKERTON SECURITY CO.
